rag.title: Q&A over notes
rag.emptyState: Ask anything about your notes. Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line.
rag.llmUnavailable: LLM unavailable — showing raw citations below.
rag.statusEmpty: Index is empty — reindex your notes

backendHealth.hint: Start the backend: `dotnet run` inside backend/

home.empty: No recordings yet — import or record your first one.
home.deleteConfirm: Delete recording "{{name}}" and its audio file? Notes will remain.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.dropzonePrompt: Drop audio here or click to pick files
dashboard.dropzoneHint: Accepts mp3 / m4a / wav / mp4 / ogg / flac
dashboard.empty: No recordings yet — import or record your first one.
dashboard.recordedSaved: Recording saved and queued for processing
dashboard.dropRequiresElectron: Drag-and-drop is only available in the desktop app

queue.title: Processing queue
queue.empty: Queue is empty. Import a recording to start processing.
queue.cancelConfirmRunning: This job is already running. Cancel anyway?

notes.deleteConfirm: Delete note "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.

actions.vaultMissing: Obsidian vault path is not configured yet.
actions.bridgeMissing: Native shell is unavailable in browser mode.

profiles.title: Processing profiles
profiles.deleteConfirm: Delete profile "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings

fields.dictationDumpEnabled: Voice dump-mode (record into _inbox/ via global hotkey)

settings.hotkeyHint: Click the field and hold the combination you want. Requires an app restart to take effect (hot-reload is tracked as H1).
settings.dumpHotkeyToggleHint: Press — recording starts under the default profile. Press again — stop; the file goes through the pipeline and exports into _inbox/.
settings.dumpHotkeyHoldHint: Hold to record, release to stop. Same path: default profile → pipeline → _inbox/.
settings.tokenHint: Stored locally in SQLite. Never leaves your machine except to the configured endpoint.

pairing.title: Pair a device
pairing.subtitle: Scan this QR code from the Syncthing mobile app to pair your phone.

status.title: Sync status
status.subtitle: Live view of folders and devices reported by Syncthing.

pending.title: Pending pairing requests
pending.subtitle: Syncthing sees a new device — accept to start syncing.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Download what you need — everything stays local.

obsidian.title: Obsidian vault
obsidian.setupHint: Wire up Obsidian — vault, plugins, templates.

emptyState.obsidian-feature-disabled: Obsidian integration is disabled in Settings
emptyState.vaultHint: Point Mozgoslav at your Obsidian vault to start.

wizard.title: Setup wizard
wizard.subtitle: Five steps — detect the vault, install plugins, sync templates.
wizard.hint: Diagnostics validate each step. If something fails, hit Run again.

diagnostics.title: Integration diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: At-a-glance view of what's connected, missing, or drifted.
diagnostics.reapplyBootstrapSuccess: Templates and scripts restored from the shipped version.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Mozgoslav
onboarding.subtitle: Quick setup so your first call works out of the box.

welcome.title: Hello!
welcome.hint: Let's get you set up. Starter models are already bundled.

tryItNow.title: Ready to go
tryItNow.hint: Whisper Small RU, Silero VAD, and Natasha NER ship in the app. Upgrade anytime in Settings → Models.

models.title: Models
models.hint: Download the bundled models — they are required for the app to work.

llm.title: LLM (optional)
llm.hint: LLM polishes your notes. Install LM Studio or Ollama — or skip and configure later.

obsidian.title: Obsidian (optional)
obsidian.hint: If you have a vault we'll pick it and prepare folders. Otherwise skip.

mic.title: Microphone access
mic.hint: Needed for recording + dictation. You can skip — macOS prompts on the first click.

dictation.title: Dictation permissions
dictation.hint: Accessibility + Input Monitoring gate the global hotkey + text injection. Skippable.

ready.title: Ready
ready.hint: Hit Apply to start using Mozgoslav. Skipped steps are always available in Settings.

onboarding.llmReachable: LLM is reachable — ready to polish notes.
onboarding.llmUnreachable: No LLM detected — skip or connect later.
onboarding.modelsReady: Models are installed — you can continue.
onboarding.modelsMissing: Download or point to a Whisper/VAD model to continue.
onboarding.obsidian.notDetected: Vault not found — skip for now.

backup.title: Backups
backup.empty: No backups yet. One click and you're covered.
